text: 这里的灯光最为强烈。能源最集中的地方。
tags: #texten:The brightest lights. Where energy is most concentrated.

column5: #texten:I made it... this is the very center.
#texten:...So bright. My head hurts so much.

text: 墙上有一段话……是这个文明最后留下的东西。
column5: #texten:There's something on the wall... the last thing this civilization left behind.

text: 把该记的都记在笔记里了。
column5: #texten:Everything worth recording is in the notes now.

text: _99[k]r……对不起，大概没办法当面告诉你了。
column5: #texten:_99[k]r... sorry. I probably can't tell you in person.
